instruction: Provide the CVE identifier and the patch identifier for reference.
input: A vulnerability classified as critical has been found in arekk uke. This affects an unknown part of the file lib/uke/finder.rb. The manipulation leads to sql injection. The identifier of the patch is 52fd3b2d0bc16227ef57b7b98a3658bb67c1833f. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier VDB-217485 was assigned to this vulnerability.
output: The CVE identifier for this vulnerability is VDB-217485, and the patch is identified by the hash 52fd3b2d0bc16227ef57b7b98a3658bb67c1833f.
